Moss Bluff Storage Conditions for 1/28/2026


Notice Text:

The following restriction will be in place on the Moss Bluff Storage (Moss Bluff) system for Gas Day January 28, 2026:

Moss Bluff has restricted excess withdrawal nominations. No increases in withdrawals will be accepted.

Moss Bluff has scheduled and sealed withdrawal nominations at meter 45205 - NGPL STORAGE, TX (D40206/R40205). No increases in withdrawals will be accepted.

Moss Bluff has scheduled and sealed withdrawal nominations at meter 45207 - TETCO - STORAGE, TX (D40208/R40207). No increases in withdrawals will be accepted.

Customers are advised that capacity may become available as the nomination and confirmation process continues throughout the day.

Please contact your Operations Account Representative if you have any questions.




BackPrint
